skill.name: learn-off
skill.description: Turns off continuous learning mode by updating the local knowledge state file.
skill.summary: Disable automatic learning while keeping manual learning available.
skill.author: 0xrdan

security_audit.summary: Static external command findings are false positives from Markdown inline code, a fenced JSON example, and sample output text in SKILL.md. The weak cryptographic algorithm finding is also a false positive because line 3 is plain frontmatter text. The only confirmed risk is limited filesystem state modification of knowledge/state.json to disable learning mode.

low_findings.title: Local State File Modification
low_findings.description: The skill instructs the assistant to read and write knowledge/state.json. This is expected for disabling learning mode, but it changes local persistent state and should stay limited to that file.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The instructions explicitly name knowledge/state.json and describe reading and writing it. No other filesystem targets are present.

low_findings.title: False Positive External Command Detection
low_findings.description: The reported Ruby or shell backtick findings are Markdown formatting, sample JSON, sample output, and slash command references. No executable shell instruction or command invocation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Every reported backtick location is in Markdown prose or fenced examples. There is no script file, shell command, Ruby code, or dynamic execution path.

low_findings.title: False Positive Weak Cryptography Detection
low_findings.description: The reported weak cryptographic algorithm at line 3 is the frontmatter description text, not a cryptographic function or algorithm reference.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 3 contains only the description field value. No cryptographic code or configuration appears in the skill file.

content.value_statement: Continuous learning can keep collecting insights after a focused session has ended. This skill turns that mode off while keeping existing knowledge and manual learning commands available.
actual_capabilities: Reads the current learning state from knowledge/state.json.
Sets learning_mode to false in the local state file.
Clears learning_mode_since when continuous learning is disabled.
Confirms that manual learning remains available through /learn.
Reports a short summary of learning activity after disabling the mode.
limitations: Does not delete existing captured insights.
Requires the expected knowledge state file to exist or be creatable.

use_cases.title: End a research session
use_cases.description: Stop automatic insight extraction after a research task while preserving collected notes.

use_cases.title: Pause project memory updates
use_cases.description: Prevent new automatic learning while switching to unrelated project work.

use_cases.title: Control assistant behavior
use_cases.description: Turn off background learning before sharing sensitive or temporary context.

prompt_templates.title: Turn learning off
prompt_templates.prompt: Disable continuous learning mode and tell me whether manual learning is still available.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request to stop automatic learning.

prompt_templates.title: Stop after this session
prompt_templates.prompt: Turn off continuous learning now and summarize the learning activity from this session.

prompt_templates.title: Pause before context switch
prompt_templates.prompt: Disable continuous learning before I switch tasks. Keep the existing knowledge base intact.
prompt_templates.scenario: User is moving to unrelated work.

prompt_templates.title: Audit state change
prompt_templates.prompt: Disable continuous learning, update only the learning state, and report the exact behavior that remains enabled.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced user wants constrained state management.

output_examples.output: Continuous learning is disabled. Learning mode is inactive, and manual extraction remains available through /learn.

output_examples.input: Turn learning off and summarize the session.
output_examples.output: Continuous learning is disabled. The session summary lists extractions, analyzed queries, and captured insights when those values are available.

output_examples.input: Pause automatic learning before I change topics.
output_examples.output: Automatic learning is paused. Existing insights remain available, and the knowledge base is not deleted.

best_practices: Use this skill before switching to unrelated or sensitive work.
Review the session summary to confirm what was captured.
Use /learn manually when you still want to save a specific insight.
anti_patterns: Do not use it when you want to delete stored knowledge.
Do not expect it to block manual learning commands.
Do not use it as a replacement for reviewing sensitive context handling.

faq.question: Does this delete previous insights?
faq.answer: No. It only disables continuous learning mode and keeps the existing knowledge base available.

faq.question: Can I still save insights manually?
faq.answer: Yes. Manual extraction remains available through /learn.

faq.question: Which file does it update?
faq.answer: It updates knowledge/state.json according to the skill instructions.

faq.question: Can I turn learning back on?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill notes that /learn-on can re-enable continuous learning.

faq.question: Does it require network access?
faq.answer: No evidence of network access was found in the skill file.

faq.question: Is this safe for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: It is low risk when limited to the documented local state file update.
